projects.title: HireHub - Full Stack Job Portal
projects.problem: Recruiters and job seekers struggle to track application lifecycles and resumes efficiently across unstructured communication channels.
projects.implementation: Built a PERN application featuring robust candidate-recruiter role dashboard isolation, dynamic application status tracking, form validation, and secure resume storage via Cloudinary.
projects.impact: Implemented seamless application submission and recruiter review flows with dynamic dashboard updates and optimized asset upload storage.

projects.title: E-Cart - MERN E-Commerce Backend
projects.problem: Building a secure checkout flow with correct stock reduction and cart operations is critical for consistent transactions.
projects.implementation: Developed a full-featured e-commerce checkout backend handling product catalogs, shopping cart state management, and transactional order dispatching using MongoDB.
projects.impact: Ensured secure order processing with MongoDB session transactions, optimizing database queries for catalog fetching and cart operations.

projects.title: Resume Coach - AI Resume ATS Optimizer
projects.problem: Traditional resume checkers provide basic word counts but miss semantic fit, resulting in low ATS screening pass rates.
projects.implementation: Created a PERN service integrating Grok API LLM endpoints for contextual text analysis, scoring resumes against Job Descriptions, and isolating missing skills.
projects.impact: Achieved resume analysis under 2.0s using custom prompt optimization and local caching of repetitive evaluations.
